title: Dynamic Client
description: The all-in-one Minecraft client built for everyone.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32f7d568603821ed938ec59026c64c1d8dcef703_0.webp)


### **The all-in-one Minecraft client built for everyone.**  
**Whether you're a redstone engineer, PvP warrior, builder, or casual player—**Dynamic Client** gives you the ultimate experience with performance boosts, modern visuals, redstone tools, PvP features, and more.**

---

### ⭐️ What Makes It Special?

Dynamic Client packs together:

- ⚡ Performance Enhancements (Sodium-based)
- 🔴 Redstone Tweaks
- 🗡️ PvP Features (like keystrokes & status timers)
- 🎨 Visual & General Upgrades (shaders, UI, resource packs)
- 🗺️ Built-in Minimap and World Map
- 🛠️ Tools like Replay Mod, Jade, World Edit, and more!

---

### 🔧 General Improvements

- ✨ **Shaders support** — immersive lighting and graphics
- 🖼️ **Built-in resource pack installer** — drag & drop made easy
- 💡 **Dynamic Lights** — light up the world with items in hand
- 🧾 **Jade HUD** — see block/item info instantly
- 📹 **Replay Mod** — record and replay your gameplay
- 📦 **OptiFine-like features** — without the mess
- 🧱 **WorldEdit** — creative building made powerful
- 🧭 **Minimap and World Map** — never get lost again
- 📜 **Improved command block UI** — cleaner and more functional
- 🌐 **Join servers from older or newer Minecraft versions** seamlessly.

---

### ⚡ Performance Improvements

- 🧪 Built on **Sodium**, **Lithium** and more for max FPS
- 🔄 Smooth gameplay on low-end PCs and high-end rigs alike

---

### 🔴 Redstone Improvements

- ⏩ **Redstone Tweaks** — improve redstone usability and behavior
- 🕹️ Game4speed to slow down and see your builds

---

### 🗡️ PvP Improvements

- ⌨️ **Keystrokes overlay** *(disabled by default — toggle on if needed by pressing f10)*
- ⏱️ **Status effect timers** — know when your buffs/debuffs end
- 🎯 **UI changes** like lower fire and shields to see your opponets while protecting yourself

---

🎮 But here’s the best part:  
**Dynamic Client is a hybrid modpack-client**, meaning:

- You can **add your own favorite mods** (like a mod that adds more mobs).
- You can **install your own resource packs or data packs** to match your vibe.
- You can tweak it, customize it, and truly make it **your Minecraft**.
- And you can do all these IN GAME!

---

### 🔧 How to Install the Dynamic Client on Modrinth
There are **two ways** to install the Dynamic Client depending on whether you have the **Modrinth App** installed or not. Follow the guide below for your case:

<details>
<summary>✅ Case 1: You Have the Modrinth AppInstalled</summary>
  
1. Open modrinth app.
2. Click on the browse icon on the bar on the left.
3. Search for "Dynamic Client".
4. Click "install".
5. Once installed, click **"Play"** in the Modrinth App and enjoy the Dynamic Client!
   
</details>

<details>
<summary>🚫 Case 2: You Don't Have the Modrinth App</summary>
  
1. Go to the modrinth website and download the [Modrinth App ](https://modrinth.com/app).
2. Once downloaded run the installation file.
3. After installation Open the Modrinth app.
4. Sign into your minecraft/microsoft account
5. Click on the browse icon on the bar on the left.
6. Search for "Dynamic Client".
7. Click "install".
6. Once installed, click **"Play"** in the Modrinth App and enjoy the Dynamic Client!
   
</details>

---

- Massive thanks to all the mod developers whose amazing work powers this client.
